title: Incident triage with Now Assist for ITSM (FSI Brazil)
nowAssistSurface: Now Assist for ITSM (Resolution Suggestion + Incident Summarization)
summary: Routes P1/P2 incidents in a tier-1 Brazilian bank with Now Assist resolution suggestions and Guardian sensitive-topic filters for LGPD-bound PII. Aimed at trimming time-to-assignment, not replacing human triage.
outcomeMetric: Target: 40 percent reduction in p95 time-to-assignment within 90 days, measured on assignment_group != Service Desk handoff. Hypothesis based on docs/best-practices/itsm.md Resolution Suggestion guidance.
guardrailHighlights: Now Assist Guardian sensitive-topic filter mandatory for incidents tagged with PII or credit data
Manual approval before any auto-close on credit-related incidents
Audit trail in sn_aia_execution_* validated quarterly per BACEN 4.893

title: Quarterly CMDB health and remediation plan
nowAssistSurface: AI Agent Studio with read-only CMDB analysis; ATF for regression coverage
summary: Produces a prioritized CMDB remediation plan for a global manufacturer LATAM with 80k CIs across hybrid cloud and on-prem. Read-only by design; no write goes out without change control.
outcomeMetric: Target: lift CMDB completeness score from 62 to 80 percent in two quarters; reduce duplicate CIs by 25 percent. Hypothesis grounded in docs/best-practices/itom.md Identification & Reconciliation guidance.
guardrailHighlights: All MCP queries read-only
Zero CMDB writes without identification rule review and approval
Cross-class write actions require Enterprise Architect Agent sign-off

title: Change risk recommendation under BACEN constraints
summary: Adds GenAI-driven change risk scoring on Normal changes for a tier-1 Brazilian bank, with manual override audit and blackout windows aligned to BACEN month-end and PIX maintenance. Three SADA-compliant alternatives evaluated before this one was selected.
outcomeMetric: Target: 30 percent reduction in CAB review time on Normal changes; zero auto-approve for high-risk classes. Hypothesis grounded in docs/best-practices/itsm.md Change section and docs/now-assist-playbook.md Caso 4.
guardrailHighlights: Never auto-approve high-risk changes
Manual override requires structured justification field, not free text
Blackout windows for BACEN reporting cycles enforced before recommendation

title: Laptop refresh catalog item with Now Assist Catalog Search
summary: Designs a dependent-variable laptop refresh catalog item for a Brazilian retail chain with 12k employees, fulfillment to a regional logistics partner, and ATF coverage for the variable matrix. Catalog Search semantic intent rather than keyword.
outcomeMetric: Target: 25 percent shift from incident-as-request to catalog submission within 60 days; SLA breach rate below 5 percent. Hypothesis grounded in docs/best-practices/itsm.md Service Catalog section.
guardrailHighlights: Read-only check for duplicate catalog items before publishing
UI policies for dependent variables, not Client Scripts
ATF suite blocks merge if variable matrix coverage drops

title: Event Management noise reduction with Now Assist for AIOps
nowAssistSurface: Now Assist for AIOps (alert correlation summarization)
summary: Cuts alert flood for a global manufacturer LATAM NOC by tightening Event Rules, validating Service Mapping, and only then layering Now Assist AIOps. Calls out that AI on a noisy baseline produces noisier dashboards.
outcomeMetric: Target: noise ratio below 30 percent within 90 days after a clean three-month baseline. Hypothesis grounded in docs/best-practices/itom.md Event Management section.
guardrailHighlights: AIOps anomaly detection only after three months of clean baseline
Exclusion windows for known seasonality (month-end, payroll)
Source whitelist on event ingestion to prevent forged events

title: PT-BR self-service Q&A for CSM portal
nowAssistSurface: Now Assist for CSM Q&A in PT-BR with curated KB scope
summary: Stands up a Portuguese-first Q&A on the customer portal of a Brazilian retail chain. Curated KB scope, Guardian sensitive-topic for LGPD, and a clear escalation to a human when the model is not confident.
outcomeMetric: Target: deflection ratio from 15 to 30 percent in 90 days on top-10 case categories. Working hypothesis aligned to docs/now-assist-playbook.md Caso 12 and docs/best-practices/csm.md self-service section.
guardrailHighlights: Now Assist Guardian sensitive-topic filter mandatory on PII
Cite-source on every generated answer
Native PT-BR human review on KB before publication; no auto-translate

title: KB ingestion from legacy Confluence with grounded Q&A
nowAssistSurface: Now Assist Q&A grounded on curated KB scope
summary: Migrates 1,200 Confluence pages into ServiceNow KB for a global manufacturer LATAM, with chunking, ACL mapping, and SME citation. Anti-pattern flagged: do not ship Q&A on a KB you have not yet curated.
outcomeMetric: Target: 250 articles published with SME citation in 60 days; Q&A precision above 85 percent on a 50-question gold set. Hypothesis aligned to docs/best-practices/now-assist.md Surface 1 and docs/now-assist-playbook.md Caso 2.
guardrailHighlights: Cite original SME or source on every article
Guardian baseline plus sensitive-topic on HR-adjacent content
ACL recommendation produced per article, never default-public

title: ACL chain performance fix without Now Assist
nowAssistSurface: None — structural fix; Now Assist deliberately not used
summary: Diagnoses a 7-second list-load on the case table caused by recursive ACL evaluation and a chained Business Rule. The council recommends not adding Now Assist on top of a slow platform; fix the ACL chain first.
outcomeMetric: Target: list load p95 below 1.2 seconds after fix, validated with before-after metrics. Hypothesis grounded in docs/best-practices/now-assist.md anti-patterns and standard ACL chain guidance.
guardrailHighlights: All performance MCP queries read-only
Every fix requires before-after metrics in writing
No Now Assist surface added until p95 returns to baseline

title: Yokohama to Zurich upgrade plan with regression coverage
nowAssistSurface: Now Assist for Code (developer accelerator during the upgrade)
summary: Plans the Yokohama-to-Zurich family upgrade for a tier-1 Brazilian bank with a hardened ATF regression suite, an LLM-as-judge harness for Now Assist behavior changes, and a documented rollback window. Now Assist for Code accelerates the developer team but does not replace test gates.
outcomeMetric: Target: zero P1 regressions in first two weeks post-cutover; rollback verified once in sub-prod. Hypothesis grounded in standard ServiceNow upgrade practice and docs/sada-framework.md anti-pattern 10.
guardrailHighlights: No upgrade plan without a documented and tested rollback
Guardian regression test before promoting any AI agent across families
ATF suite must pass with Yokohama-equivalent dataset before cutover

title: Quarterly vendor performance review (agentic, read-only tools)
nowAssistSurface: AI Agent Studio agent with read-only Table API tool whitelist
summary: Compresses a two-week vendor review cycle into a one-day draft for a global manufacturer LATAM procurement team. Demonstrates the agentic pattern correctly: read-only tool whitelist, structured summarization skill, human approval before any penalty action.
outcomeMetric: Target: review cycle from 10 business days to 2; zero auto-actioned penalties. Hypothesis aligned to docs/now-assist-playbook.md Caso 11.
guardrailHighlights: Tool whitelist read-only across vendor, contracts, incidents, SLAs
Human approval mandatory before any contract or penalty change
Audit log preserved for procurement audit and contract dispute
